# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  vmName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: webapp-vm
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Machine.
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_DS1_v2
    metadata:
      description: Size of the Virtual Machine.
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    defaultValue: azureuser
    metadata:
      description: Username for the Virtual Machine.
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Password for the Virtual Machine.
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: '[resourceGroup().location]'
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources.

variables:
  # Naming conventions
  publicIpAddressName: '[concat(parameters(\'vmName\'), \'-pip\')]'
  virtualNetworkName: '[concat(parameters(\'vmName\'), \'-vnet\')]'
  subnetName: default
  networkSecurityGroupName: '[concat(parameters(\'vmName\'), \'-nsg\')]'
  networkInterfaceName: '[concat(parameters(\'vmName\'), \'-nic\')]'
  osDiskName: '[concat(parameters(\'vmName\'), \'-osdisk\')]'
  dataDiskName: '[concat(parameters(\'vmName\'), \'-datadisk0\')]'
  bootDiagnosticsStorageAccountName: '[concat(\'diag\', parameters(\'vmName\'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]'

  # IP Configuration
  nicIpConfigurationName: ipconfig1

  # VNet Address Space
  virtualNetworkAddressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/16
  subnetAddressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24

  # VM Image Reference (Ubuntu 20.04 LTS)
  imagePublisher: Canonical
  imageOffer: UbuntuServer
  imageSku: '20.04-LTS'
  imageVersion: latest

  # Data Disk Configuration
  dataDiskSizeGb: 100 # Size of the data disk in GB

  # Custom Data for web server setup (installs Nginx for demonstration)
  customData: '[base64(concat(\'#!/bin/bash\napt-get update\napt-get install -y nginx\nsystemctl start nginx\nsystemctl enable nginx\necho "<h1>Hello from Azure VM: \', parameters(\'vmName\'), \'</h1>" | tee /var/www/html/index.nginx-debian.html\n\'))]'

resources:
  # Storage Account for Boot Diagnostics
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2021-09-01
    name: '[variables(\'bootDiagnosticsStorageAccountName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true

  # Virtual Network
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2020-11-01
    name: '[variables(\'virtualNetworkName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - '[variables(\'virtualNetworkAddressPrefix\')]'
      subnets:
        - name: '[variables(\'subnetName\')]'
          properties:
            addressPrefix: '[variables(\'subnetAddressPrefix\')]'

  # Public IP Address
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: 2020-11-01
    name: '[variables(\'publicIpAddressName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: '[toLower(concat(parameters(\'vmName\'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)))]' # Ensure unique DNS label

  # Network Security Group (NSG)
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2020-11-01
    name: '[variables(\'networkSecurityGroupName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: SSH
          properties:
            priority: 1000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet # Allow SSH from any IP (for quick deployment)
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '22'
        - name: HTTP
          properties:
            priority: 1001
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet # Allow HTTP from any IP
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '80'

  # Network Interface (NIC)
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: 2020-11-01
    name: '[variables(\'networkInterfaceName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks\', variables(\'virtualNetworkName\'))]'
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses\', variables(\'publicIpAddressName\'))]'
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups\', variables(\'networkSecurityGroupName\'))]'
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: '[variables(\'nicIpConfigurationName\')]'
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses\', variables(\'publicIpAddressName\'))]'
            subnet:
              id: '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets\', variables(\'virtualNetworkName\'), variables(\'subnetName\'))]'
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups\', variables(\'networkSecurityGroupName\'))]'

  # Virtual Machine
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2020-12-01
    name: '[parameters(\'vmName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces\', variables(\'networkInterfaceName\'))]'
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts\', variables(\'bootDiagnosticsStorageAccountName\'))]'
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: '[parameters(\'vmSize\')]'
      osProfile:
        computerName: '[parameters(\'vmName\')]'
        adminUsername: '[parameters(\'adminUsername\')]'
        adminPassword: '[parameters(\'adminPassword\')]'
        customData: '[variables(\'customData\')]'
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: '[variables(\'imagePublisher\')]'
          offer: '[variables(\'imageOffer\')]'
          sku: '[variables(\'imageSku\')]'
          version: '[variables(\'imageVersion\')]'
        osDisk:
          name: '[variables(\'osDiskName\')]'
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Standard_LRS # Default for quick deployment, no encryption
        dataDisks:
          - lun: 0
            name: '[variables(\'dataDiskName\')]'
            createOption: Empty
            diskSizeGB: '[variables(\'dataDiskSizeGb\')]'
            managedDisk:
              storageAccountType: Standard_LRS # Default for quick deployment, no encryption
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces\', variables(\'networkInterfaceName\'))]'
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
          storageUri: '[reference(resourceId(\'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts\', variables(\'bootDiagnosticsStorageAccountName\')), \'2021-09-01\').primaryEndpoints.blob]'
```
